# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vmSize": "Standard_DS2_v2",
    "vmStorageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[variables('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[parameters('vmName')]",
          "adminUsername": "yourusername",
          "adminPassword": "yourpassword"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
            "offer": "WindowsServer",
            "sku": "2019-Datacenter",
            "version": "latest"
          }
        }
      },
      "networkProfile": {
        "networkInterfaces": [
          {
            "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', parameters('vmName'))]"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "storageProfile": {
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage"
          },
          "dataDisks": [
            {
              "name": "Data Disk 1",
              "lun": 0,
              "createOption": "Empty",
              "diskSizeGB": 1023
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {}
}
